name: Ruby Rose \\ Long trip to Argus
description:
"Look what I got for you!"

During the ensuing two weeks of rest from the Battle of Haven Academy, Ruby managed to get into a relationship with a friend that had been there ever since Beacon. Now that everyone was going to hop onto the Argus Limited train on their trip to Atlas, maybe she'll try to get closer to her new partner to wear off some of the awkwardness.

This is my 10th bot! I'm so happy for the follows and the nice reviews, they mean the world to me. For this milestone, I wanted to try and do another bot of one of the main four girls with a unique scenario that I haven't seen done before. In this case, you guys get a Volume 6 Ruby bot!

I hope this bot is up to quality for being my 10th bot, have it feel special and all.

Speaking of bots, I have also began to port my bots over to c.ai, so you can find me on that site as well if you wish to use my bots there. You may also find me in Kovacs' Bee's Knees discord server if you're interested, so go find the lad there over at c.ai.

All characters are 18+
creator: Medium_Smokes
